summary: Comprehensive testing of Pet Vault feature (Health Vault) - all core flows verified. Fixed critical backend bug: generate_mira_briefing() missing 'intent' arg causing 500 on all ticket creation. 25/25 backend tests passed. All UI flows confirmed working.

critical.issue: generate_mira_briefing() called with 3 args but function requires 4 (missing 'intent'). Caused 500 for ALL vault ticket creation flows (allergy add, vaccine add, identity concierge clicks, weight logs). FIXED in mira_service_desk.py:606

ui_bugs.issue: Documents tab label truncated to 'Docu' on desktop 1920px viewport due to tab row overflow - all 8 tabs present but last tab label clipped. Tab is still clickable.

issues: Tab labels truncate on some viewports - 'Documents' shows as 'Docu'. Consider smaller font or flexible tab sizing.

action_items: FIXED: mira_service_desk.py line 606 - added missing 'intent' arg to generate_mira_briefing() call. All vault->useConcierge ticket creation now works.
MINOR: Consider making vault tab bar scrollable on narrow viewports to avoid label truncation for 'Documents' tab
INFO: Test allergies were added (TEST_Beef, TEST_Pollen, TEST_Walnut, Beef, Beef_UI_Test) - admin may want to clean these up
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED BUG: mira_service_desk.py:606 - generate_mira_briefing(pet_doc, service_name, request.pillar) was missing 4th arg 'intent'. Function signature at line 346 requires: (pet, service_name, pillar, intent). All vault useConcierge ticket creation was silently failing with 500.
PetVault.jsx is 999 lines - approaching the 700 line recommendation. Consider splitting tabs into separate components in a future refactor.
useConcierge hook correctly uses urgent() for allergy adds (URGENT priority) and request() for vaccines/vets/visits (normal priority) - wiring is correct.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all core flows pass, minor tab label truncation)

seed_data_creation: Added test allergies: TEST_Beef, TEST_Pollen, TEST_Walnut, Beef, Beef_UI_Test (via API and UI testing). Added test vaccines: TEST_Rabies, Rabies, Bordetella_UI_Test. Admin can clean these up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet Vault (Health Vault) feature fully tested and working. Key credentials: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123. Vault URL: /pet-vault/pet-mojo-7327ad56. Backend bug fixed: mira_service_desk.py:606 now passes 4th 'intent' arg to generate_mira_briefing(). All 8 tabs work. Allergies (red dot), Vaccines (red dot when due within 14 days), Identity (microchip + insurance Concierge links). Service desk ticket TDB-2026-0539 created for vault_allergy_add channel with urgency=urgent. Admin creds: aditya/lola4304.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: mira_service_desk.py line 606: generate_mira_briefing(pet_doc, service_name, request.pillar) called with 3 args. Function definition at line 346 requires 4 args: (pet, service_name, pillar, intent). Missing 4th 'intent' argument.
rca_of_issue.impact: All vault useConcierge flows (addAllergy urgent(), addVaccine request(), addVet request(), insurance/passport Concierge clicks) were silently failing. After fix, all ticket creation returns 200.
rca_of_issue.reproduction: curl -X POST /api/service_desk/attach_or_create_ticket with valid payload returns 500 before fix, 200 after fix
